description: Canonical COMPLETE set of default-branch CI workflows whose successful run at the release source commit is REQUIRED before a Sentinel Shield release may be authorized. This is the authority consumed by scripts/lib/release-authz.sh (ra_check_evidence_source) — it replaces any ad hoc 'at least one successful run' heuristic. Membership is the set of workflows in config/required-checks.json that publish at least one 'always-required' check-run (i.e. every workflow that runs on every push to the default branch and is a required status check). For EVERY workflow listed here the release-evidence must present EXACTLY ONE authoritative engine_ci run: exact workflow_name, exact repository, exact source commit, an approved default-branch event, a successful conclusion, and the declared artifact state. Keep this file in lockstep with config/required-checks.json and docs/branch-protection.md.
